big_problem: Lab OG snapshots should surface the same leaders the panel highlights — not arbitrary table order.
epic: Lab L5 — OG snapshot row fidelity
slice_title: Breakouts OG export ranks top-6 by breakout score
parity_ref: Explore L5 — Lab panel OG data rows
acceptance_commands: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('apps/web/components/lab/renderers/BreakoutsRenderer.tsx','utf8');if(!/sort\(\(a, b\).*rbs_score/.test(s.replace(/\s+/g,' ')))process.exit(1);console.log('breakouts og sorted by score');"
